history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is safe, but the goal is visible ahead and to the right. Moving forward keeps me progressing toward the open path while avoiding the lava on the right side for now.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now adjacent to a lava cell directly in front of me, so moving forward would be deadly. The safe open cell is to my right, so I should turn clockwise to face it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible up-left from my position, but the direct path upward is blocked by lava. The cell to my right is safe and open, so I should move forward into it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
